programme.title: 🌊 2.6m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.4m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.0m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 3.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 2.0m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.2m @ 11s CROSS
